string.text: Zone handed us problem. You look alive enough to solve it. Just talk, no contract. Keep ears open.
Tell me what this really is.
Slower. Break it down for me.
Loner angle: Keep this quiet until you know who benefits. Setup already added: targets, branches, and effects.
Keep it simple: who, what, where, why. Then decide.
